name: raycast-show
title: Show
description: Search TMDB, resolve Torrentio + Real-Debrid, and launch VLC/mpv.
author: thomas

commands.name: show
commands.title: Show
commands.description: Search a movie or TV show and play it with VLC/mpv

preferences.name: tmdbApiKey
preferences.title: TMDB API Key
preferences.description: Optional override. Falls back to TMDB_API_KEY from .env.

preferences.name: realDebridToken
preferences.title: Real-Debrid Token
preferences.description: Optional override. Falls back to REAL_DEBRID_TOKEN from .env.

preferences.name: torrentioBaseUrl
preferences.title: Torrentio Base URL
preferences.description: Optional override. Falls back to TORRENTIO_BASE_URL from .env.

preferences.name: mpvBinary
preferences.title: Legacy MPV Binary
preferences.description: Backward compatibility. Prefer Player Binary instead.

preferences.name: ffmpegBinary
preferences.title: FFmpeg Binary
preferences.description: Executable name/path for ffmpeg used by MP4 conversion downloads.

preferences.name: enableResolvedCache
preferences.label: Enable cache
preferences.title: Enable Resolved Cache
preferences.description: Reuse previously resolved links when available.

preferences.name: clearResolvedCacheOnLaunch
preferences.label: Clear cache on launch
preferences.title: Clear Resolved Cache on Launch
preferences.description: Delete all cached resolved links when this command starts.
